feed.title: [BIP proposal] Pay to Schnorr Key Hash (P2SKH)

entry.title: [BIP proposal] Pay to Schnorr Key Hash (P2SKH)
entry.summary: In a recent communication regarding a proposal, an oversight was acknowledged by the sender who initially misunderstood the use of pubkey-prefixing being discussed. The clarification highlighted that the original discourse involved the application of hash-160 of P for pubkey-prefixing, which the sender admitted to having overlooked. This misunderstanding led to an unnecessary elaboration on the topic of pubkey-prefixing which, while potentially interesting to some, was misplaced in this context. This exchange took place within the Bitcoin Development Mailing List group, a forum dedicated to discussions surrounding Bitcoin's development.
